title: A Quebec Selection Certificate (CSQ) holder outside Quebec needs a work permit  - Canada.ca
content:
## A Quebec Selection Certificate (CSQ) holder outside Quebec needs a work permit

## You need a work permit
If you’re a Quebec Selection Certificate (CSQ) holder and you’re outside Quebec, you need a work permit.
You can apply for an open work permit (opens in a new tab) .
CSQ validity under this exemption
When you apply for this work permit, you must be in 1 of the following situations:
- If you haven’t applied for permanent residence, your CSQ must be valid when you apply.
- If you’ve already applied for permanent residence, your CSQ must have been valid when you applied for permanent residence, and the processing of the application must be ongoing.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
